description: Cross-repo instance index. Each source points at a repo's bench data folder pinned to a commit; instance files follow the Instance JSON schema in schema.py. The runner resolves instances from these pointers so one manifest drives cross-repo runs.

sources.notes: In-repo source; pinned_commit null means resolve from the working checkout.
Numerics-parity instances with boundary-crossing cases; oracle kind cargo-test. Validation booleans recorded in each instance file.
